raw_notes:
The 12 Slays of Fitmas

Edit

Score Time

+ Video

RX:

For Time*

Day 1 - Ring Muscle-Up

Day 2 - 200m Row or .2/.3 mile Bike

Day 3 - DB Power Cleans (35/50s#)

Day 4 - Pull-Ups

Day 5 - Box Jumps (20/24")

Day 6 - DB Front Squats

Day 7 - Toes-to-Bar

Day 8 - Alternating Jumping Lunges

Day 9 - DB Shoulder-to-Overhead

Day 10 - DB Goblet Sit-Ups**

Day 11 - No-Push-Up Renegade Rows***

Day 12 - DB Thrusters

INTERMEDIATE:

For Time*

Day 1 - Strict Pull-Up

Day 2 - 200m Row / .2/.3 mile Bike

Day 3 - DB Power Cleans (20/35s#)

Day 4 - Jumping Pull-Ups

Day 5 - Box Jumps (16/20")

Day 6 - DB Front Squats

Day 7 - Knees-to-Chest

Day 8 - Alternating Jumping Lunges

Day 9 - DB Shoulder-to-Overhead

Day 10 - DB Goblet Sit-Ups**

Day 11 - No-Push-Up Renegade Rows***

Day 12 - DB Thrusters

FOUNDATIONS:

For Time*

Day 1 - Ring Row

Day 2 - 200m Row or .2/ .3 mile Bike

Day 3 - DB Hang Power Cleans (up to 20s#)

Day 4 - Jumping Pull-Ups

Day 5 - Box Jumps (12/16")

Day 6 - Goblet Squats

Day 7 - Toes-to-Rig

Day 8 - Alternating Lunges

Day 9 - DB Shoulder-to-Overhead

Day 10 - Leg Rainbows Over DB

Day 11 - Low Bear No-Push-Up Renegade Rows***

Day 12 - DB Thrusters

*1 Rep = Row R + Row L

(Score = Time)

SCORE = For Time

WOD TYPE: GRIND

Intended Stimulus: 36-40 Minutes

RPE: 9
